title: Architecture Review: billing-svc
summary: Billing service is mostly sound; one in-process cache could use a TTL.
current_state_assessment: Handlers call into a small pricing module. One module-level cache exists for negotiated pricing lookups.

findings.title: Unbounded process-local pricing cache
findings.message: _PRICING_CACHE in billing/pricing.py grows without eviction and could go stale if negotiated prices change mid-process-lifetime.

nfr_risks.risk: cache staleness after a price change

recommendations.action: add a TTL to the pricing cache
